subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath manifested His Cause, perfected His testimony and completed His proof in such wise that the dwellers therein have borne witness [3.5s]... ...It is clear and evident that the payment of the Right of God is conducive to prosperity, to blessing, and to honour and divine protection
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اظهر امره و اتم حجته و اکمل برهانه علی شان شهد لها سکان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @law of Huququ'llah, @wisdom [hikmat], @exhortations and counsels, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @rejection, opposition and persecution
